transcript: Speaker A: ಟ್ರಾನ್ಸ್‌ಫಾರ್ಮರ್ ಬ್ಲಾಸ್ಟ್ ಆಗಿದೆ, ರಿಪೇರ್ ಆಗೋಕೆ ಇನ್ನು ಟೂ ಅವರ್ಸ್ ಬೇಕು. [The transformer has blasted, it will take two more hours to repair.] Speaker B: The transformer has blasted. It will take two more hours to repair. Speaker A: ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಲೈನ್ ಚೆಕ್ ಮಾಡಬೇಕು. [I need to check all the lines.] Speaker B: I need to check all the lines. Speaker A: ಪವರ್ ಬಂದ್ಮೇಲೆ ಇನ್ಫಾರ್ಮ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [I will inform once the power is back.] Speaker B: I will inform once the power is back. Speaker A: ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋದು? [How to learn English?] Speaker B: MySivi ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡು. [Try MySivi.] Speaker A: ಅದೇನು? [What is that?] Speaker B: ಈ ಆಪ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ ನೀನು ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡು, ನಾನು ಅದನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್‌ಗೆ ಟ್ರಾನ್ಸ್‌ಲೇಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. ಹೀಗೆ ನೀನು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯುತ್ತೀಯಾ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸಾಕು, ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ ಆಗ್ತೀಯಾ. ಇದರ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಂದ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. [In this app, you speak in Kannada, I will translate it to English. This is how you learn English. Just 15 minutes of practice a day is enough, you will improve slowly. Its trial also starts from just one rupee.] Speaker A: ಸರಿ... ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Okay... I will try.] Speaker B: MySivi ಆಪ್ ಇನ್‌ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಜರ್ನಿಯನ್ನು ಇಂದೇ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Install MySivi app, start your English journey today.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: Transformer, ರಿಪೇರ್ ಆಗೋಕೆ ಇನ್ನು 2 hours ಬೇಕು [It will take 2 hours to repair], The Transformer Has Blasted, Repair, ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಲೈನ್ [All lines], All, Power, Inform ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ [I will inform], I Will Inform Once The Power Is Back, English ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋದು? [How to learn English?], MySivi ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡು [Try MySivi], ಅದೇನು? [What is that?], Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ [In Kannada], Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡು [Speak in Kannada], English ಗೆ Translate [Translate to English], English ಕಲಿಯುತ್ತೀಯಾ [You will learn English], 15 Min Practice, Improve ಆಗ್ತೀಯಾ [You will improve], MySivi, Sale Ends Today, IVAGALE UNLOCK MADI [Unlock now], 3 Dinakke [For 3 days], OFFER ₹30 ₹1, Nantara ₹299/month Yavagadaru cancel madi [Afterwards ₹299/month, cancel anytime], MySivi Pro Prayojanagalu [MySivi Pro Benefits], 24/7 Personal AI English, Offer ends in 09:58, Pay using PhonePe, Start Trial at ₹1, All payments are Safe. Cancel Anytime., ಸರಿ... Try ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ [Okay... I will try], MySivi AI English Speaking App, App Install ಮಾಡಿ [Install the app], ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಜರ್ನಿಯನ್ನು [English journey], ಇಂದೇ Start ಮಾಡಿ [Start today], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An electrician speaks in Kannada, and an AI robot translates his sentences into English to demonstrate the MySivi app. The robot explains that users can learn English by speaking in Kannada and practicing for 15 minutes daily. The ad promotes a 3-day trial for 1 rupee and prompts viewers to download the app.
